x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert-to-incident conversion is the mechanism by which Now Assist ITOM connects infrastructure events to ITSM workflows. Zero conversion means AI has no historical alert-incident linkage.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts meeting severity and duration thresholds. Now Assist ITOM uses alert-to-incident linkage for AI-suggested remediation — zero conversion means this capability has no historical data to learn from.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert-to-incident conversion is the mechanism by which Now Assist ITOM connects infrastructure events to ITSM workflows. Zero conversion means AI has no historical alert-incident linkage.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Alert-to-Incident Conversion Rate</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No alerts in last 90 days',
            finding: 'No alerts found in the last 90 days. Alert-to-incident conversion rate cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaLinked = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    gaLinked.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaLinked.addQuery('incident', '!=', '');
    gaLinked.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaLinked.query();
    var withInc = gaLinked.next() ? parseInt(gaLinked.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withInc / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of alerts generated incidents in last 90 days (' + withInc + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% alert-to-incident conversion rate (last 90 days). Now Assist ITOM has sufficient historical alert-incident linkage for AI-suggested remediation learning.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% alert-to-incident conversion (last 90 days, target: 10%+). Now Assist ITOM AI remediation suggestions will have limited historical data to learn from.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Zero alert-to-incident conversion in the last 90 days. Now Assist ITOM cannot surface AI-suggested remediation without historical alert-incident linkage.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005988</number>
<order>90</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts meeting severity and duration thresholds. Now Assist ITOM uses alert-to-incident linkage for AI-suggested remediation — zero conversion means this capability has no historical data to learn from.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4c</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
